reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark a claim satisfied only when deterministic schema tests and checked-in schema files directly prove the narrow packet contract.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by scenario proposal input/output schemas and schema tests that bound evidence sourceKind to portable source ports while requiring only sourceKind, title, and observedAt as provenance fields, with no required host storage path fields.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep scenario proposal evidence sourceKind enum and host-storage non-requirement tests in place when changing proposal schemas.
